items.title: United sees demand 'strengthening' as profits edge lower
items.description: United Airlines reported a slight dip in profits Wednesday as operating expenses ticked higher, adding that a strengthening demand outlook would boost fourth-quarter results.United is poised for a "strong" fourth quarter "as the demand environment strengthens," said a United press release.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips After Exhausting Day; Advanced Micro Surges (Live Coverage)
items.description: Nvidia was also jerked around, while Advanced Micro Devices bolted higher on the stock market today.  The Dow ended the day slightly lower with a 17-point dip, after making big swings in the final hours of trading.  The S&P 500 clung to a gain in the final hour after messy afternoon action and finished 0.4% higher.

items.title: Sector Update: Tech Stocks Climb Late Afternoon
items.description: Tech stocks rose late Wednesday afternoon with the Technology Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLK) adding 0

items.title: Apple Updates Products Ahead of Holiday Season
items.description: Apple has updated its top-of-the-line products including its iPad Pro, Vision Pro headset and 14-inch MacBook Pro. Bloomberg's Mark Gurman discusses the changes and the company's plans and promises to build in India and China. He joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech."

items.title: Apple Shifts Smart Home Production To Vietnam
items.description: Apple and BYD team up together to assemble hub, robot, devices from 2025
